guestPrompt.title: You're doing great!
guestPrompt.message: Create a free account to save your score and keep your progress safe. Without an account, your XP will be lost when you leave.
guestPrompt.benefit1: Save your XP and learning progress permanently
guestPrompt.benefit2: Track your scores across lessons and flashcards
guestPrompt.benefit3: Pick up right where you left off

home.heroSubtitle: Structured lessons, interactive flashcards, and progress tracking — all with native audio.
home.unlockDesc: Enable Challenge Mode to track your streak, complete daily quests, and compete on the leaderboard!
home.stopDecayWarning: Answer a question to stop the decay!
home.adminDesc: Manage users, view analytics, and monitor site activity.
home.leaderboardSubtitle: Top Challenge Mode learners this week
home.leaderboardEmpty: No activity this week yet. Be the first!
home.billingDesc: Choose individual access or request seats for your school, religious organization, company, or group.

lessons.title: {{language}} <1>Lessons</1>
lessons.subtitle: Learn practical skills you can apply right away
lessons.studyAllDesc: Beginner → Intermediate → Advanced → Sentences, across all categories
lessons.customizeHint: Click cards to select lessons in your desired order
lessons.noLessonsHint: Try adjusting your filters or check back soon for new content!

lessonDetail.flashcardInProgress: You have a flashcard session in progress. Would you like to continue it or start this lesson?
lessonDetail.lessonInProgress: You have "{{title}}" in progress (question {{index}}). Would you like to continue it or start this lesson?
lessonDetail.listeningHint: Listen carefully, then answer the quiz below

flashcards.createFirst: Create your first flashcard to start learning!
flashcards.listeningHint: Listen & guess, then tap to reveal
flashcards.failedToRecord: Failed to record answer. Please try again.
flashcards.lessonInProgress: You have "{{title}}" in progress (question {{index}}). Would you like to continue it or start flashcards?
flashcards.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this flashcard?

progress.title: Your <1>Progress</1>
progress.subtitle: Track your learning journey
progress.noActivities: No activities in this category yet.
progress.noStruggles: You're not struggling with anything right now. Keep it up!
progress.spacedRepetitionTip: Review flashcards regularly to improve retention
progress.activePracticeTip: Focus on struggling areas to improve faster
progress.stayConsistentTip: Study a little bit every day for best results

profilePage.voiceDescription: Choose a {{language}} voice for pronunciation. Your selection syncs across devices.
profilePage.noVoices: No {{language}} voices available on this device. Try using Chrome or Edge for more voice options.
profilePage.xpModeDescription: Choose how your XP system works. Challenge Mode adds XP decay for inactivity.
profilePage.relaxedDesc: No XP decay. Learn at your own pace.
profilePage.challengeDesc: XP decays after 48h of inactivity. Stay sharp!
profilePage.challengeWarning: Switching to Challenge Mode will reset your XP to 0. Your learning history will be preserved, but you'll start earning XP from scratch.
profilePage.challengeDetail: In Challenge Mode, your XP decays by 15% per day after 48 hours of inactivity. Only answering questions resets the timer.
profilePage.relaxedWarning: Your current XP will be preserved in Relaxed Mode. However, if you switch back to Challenge Mode in the future, your XP will be wiped to 0.
profilePage.resetProgressDesc: Reset your XP and answer history. Your XP will go back to 0 and all questions will award full points again.
profilePage.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset your XP and answer history? Your XP will go back to 0.
profilePage.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
profilePage.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
profilePage.challengeEnabled: Challenge Mode enabled! XP has been reset.
profilePage.relaxedEnabled: Switched to Relaxed Mode. Your XP is preserved.
profilePage.xpReset: XP and answer history reset successfully!
profilePage.personalizationDesc: Save approved words, phrases, and situations from real life so class, conversation, quiz, flashcards, and writing practice can become more relevant to you.
profilePage.voiceSettingsDesc: Choose separate voices for your target language and your native language so mixed replies are pronounced naturally.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
forgotPassword.sentMessage: If an account with that email exists, we sent a password reset link.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
resetPassword.noToken: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.

emailBanner.message: Please verify your email address. Check your inbox (and spam/junk folder) for a verification link.
emailBanner.sent: Verification email sent! Check your inbox and spam/junk folder.
emailBanner.failed: Failed to send email. Please try again.

verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email is verified. You're all set to learn!
verifyEmail.noToken: No verification token found in the link.
verifyEmail.failedMessage: Verification failed. The link may have expired.
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: A new verification email has been sent! Check your inbox and spam/junk folder.

verifyEmail.loginToResend: Please log in first to resend the verification email.

admin.title: Admin <1>Dashboard</1>
admin.subtitle: Monitor activity, manage users, and view analytics
admin.flashcardsPrivateNote: These are private flashcards added by users. Only visible to you and the creator.
admin.suspendConfirm: Are you sure you want to suspend {{username}}?
admin.suspendNote: This user will not be able to log in until reactivated.
admin.deleteUserConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{{username}}"? This will also delete all their data and cannot be undone.
admin.promoteConfirm: Promote {{username}} to admin? They will have full access to this dashboard.

contact.title: Tell us what you need
contact.subtitle: Send a question, report a problem, or share feedback. We will review your message and respond when needed.
contact.infoText: Messages from this form are saved securely with account context when available, so we can understand what happened and help faster.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Thanks. Your message has been received.
contact.error: We could not send your message right now. Please try again.

pricing.title: Choose how you want to learn
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade for deeper practice, or bring Lingo Booth to a group with institution seats.
pricing.checkoutSetupNeeded: Online checkout is being connected. You can send a request and we will help you continue.
pricing.checkoutFailed: Could not start checkout. Please try again.
pricing.loadFailed: Could not load plans. Please try again.
pricing.institutionalTitle: Seats for schools, teams, religious organizations, and groups
pricing.institutionalSubtitle: Institutional subscriptions sit beside individual plans. Members can receive Plus, Pro, or Ultra-level access through their organization without changing their personal account.
pricing.institutionalSent: Thanks. Your request has been received.
pricing.institutionalFailed: Could not send the request. Please try again.
pricing.needHelpText: Send a message and we will help you choose the right path.

planTaglines.free: Try the learning loop with daily limits.
planTaglines.plus: More daily conversation and device memory.
planTaglines.pro: Synced memory and personalization for serious learners.
planTaglines.ultra: Everything in Pro, ready for future premium learning tools.
planTaglines.institution_basic: Seats for groups that need guided learning and practice.
planTaglines.institution_pro: Synced learner memory, reports, and class management.
planTaglines.institution_enterprise: Custom onboarding, reporting, and commercial terms.

pricing.discountUnavailable: That discount code is not available for this plan.

billing.subtitle: Review your current access, manage personal billing, or view plans for individuals and institutions.
billing.profileText: Manage your plan, open billing, or review individual and institution access.
billing.cancelsAtPeriodEnd: Cancels at the end of the current period
billing.personalBillingHint: Personal checkout and store purchases appear here.
billing.institutionHint: Institution seats appear here when assigned.
billing.manageText: Use the billing portal when it is connected, or choose a different plan.
billing.portalSetupNeeded: The billing portal is being connected. Please try again after setup is complete.

pronunciation.audioFirstNote: Listen closely. This spelling is only a guide.

voicePicker.subtitle: Tap a voice to hear a sample sentence, then choose the one you want for class.
voicePicker.useDefault: Use the default voice for now

classLesson.tapToEnableAudio: Tap anywhere to enable spoken tutor replies on this device.
classLesson.setupReady: I am ready to guide this lesson. Choose a lesson action, or type your own question.
classLesson.noItemsTagged: No items are tagged for this activity yet. Pick another activity, or seed reading/listening/pronunciation/culture content for this section.
classLesson.translationPending: Translation is being prepared for your language.
classLesson.speechUnavailable: Speech input is not available in this browser
classLesson.inputPlaceholder: Ask a question or type your answer...
classLesson.tutorCouldNotReply: The tutor could not reply this time. Please try again.

status.preparingNextStep: Tutor is preparing your next step...
status.markedCompleteNext: Marked complete. Moving to the next item.
status.voiceUnavailable: Voice input is unavailable on this device. You can type in the box below instead.
status.listeningPrompt: Listening... tap the mic again when you finish.
status.speechCaptured: Speech captured. Edit if needed, then press send.
status.voiceUpdated: Voice updated. Tap a line to hear it.

speechErrors.permissionBlocked: Microphone or speech recognition permission is blocked. Open Settings, allow the mic for this app, then try again.
speechErrors.noSpeech: No speech was heard. Tap the mic and speak after the listening indicator.
speechErrors.noMicrophone: No microphone detected. Plug in or enable a microphone, then try again.
speechErrors.network: Network error during speech recognition. Check your connection and try again.
speechErrors.captureFailed: Could not capture speech. Please try again.

classLesson.nativeGlossToggleHint: Read {{native}} aloud after each {{target}} line. Click any line individually to hear it regardless.

exampleCue.dialogueWithTopic: Example conversation about {{topic}}. Listen to Person A and Person B.
exampleCue.dialogue: Example conversation. Listen to Person A and Person B.

preview.title: Lesson overview
preview.goal: Preview the lesson and set a learning goal.
preview.task: Tell the tutor what you want to understand first.

learn.title: Guided explanation
learn.goal: Study the selected lesson item with the tutor.
learn.task: Ask for a simple explanation or example.

practice.title: Active practice
practice.goal: Use the target language in a short answer.
practice.task: Write or say one original answer using the lesson material.

review.title: Check understanding
review.goal: Review mistakes and summarize what you learned.
review.task: Summarize one thing you learned and one thing that is still unclear.

classLesson.loadError: Could not load this class lesson.

classList.title: Learn with your tutor
classList.subtitle: Choose a structured class unit and move through vocabulary, grammar, dialogue, speaking, and writing with guided support.
classList.note: Built for guided lessons, not quick drills.
classList.emptyBody: Class lessons are being prepared for this language. Please check back soon.
classList.loadError: Could not load class lessons. Make sure the backend is running and seeded.

tracks.foundationSubtitle: Start here with the sound and writing system for {{language}}.
tracks.thematicSubtitle: Core everyday lessons for greetings, food, places, plans, and daily situations.
tracks.intermediateSubtitle: Topic-driven units for opinions, culture, health, work, and everyday confidence.
tracks.professionalSubtitle: Practical language for work, services, housing, safety, and formal situations.
tracks.grammarSubtitle: Pattern clusters that help you connect ideas with more control.

contextPractice.title: Lessons shaped around you
contextPractice.lockedDesc: Pro and Ultra can save approved words, phrases, and situations from real life so future practice feels more relevant. Free and Plus can continue using the regular lessons and conversation practice.
contextPractice.upgradeDesc: Upgrade when you want lessons, review prompts, and roleplays to adapt to the everyday language you approve.
contextPractice.subtitle: Capture a visible practice session, review the useful words and situations, then save only what you approve. Saved items help {{language}} class and conversation practice feel more relevant.
contextPractice.unsupportedSpeech: This browser does not support speech recognition. You can paste notes below instead.
contextPractice.transcriptPlaceholder: Captured transcript or notes appear here. Raw transcript is not saved unless you copy it somewhere yourself.
contextPractice.privacyNote: Raw audio is not stored. The transcript is used only for this analysis request.
contextPractice.emptyAnalysis: Analyze a session to see suggested topics, words, and phrases.
contextPractice.emptyRecommendations: Save personalization items to unlock roleplays, review drills, and class prompts.

conversation.speechUnavailableTitle: Speech input is not available in this browser
conversation.notAvailableTitle: Conversation Practice is not available on this plan.
conversation.notAvailableBody: Daily conversation practice is available on Free, Plus, and Pro.

exerciseHub.title: Choose an exercise
exerciseHub.subtitle: Practice with quizzes, review vocabulary with flashcards, or build handwriting memory.
exerciseHub.quizDesc: Work through lesson questions and check your understanding.
exerciseHub.flashcardsDesc: Review words and phrases until they feel familiar.
exerciseHub.writingDesc: Trace, copy, listen, recall by meaning, and keep a handwriting notebook.

quizPage.subtitle: Choose a quiz and answer practice questions.

instructions.addToBegin: Add a word or sentence to begin.
instructions.trace: Trace over the guide, then clear and write from memory.
instructions.copy: Look carefully, then copy the word or sentence.
instructions.listen: Press Play, write what you hear, then reveal the answer.
instructions.stroke: Follow the guide, then use the writing area to practice.
instructions.review: Compare your writing with the answer and mark what was strong.

status.emptyNotebook: Add a word or open Class to fill your notebook.
status.savedComplete: Saved as complete. Moving to the next item.

strokeGuide.emptyMemory: Write it once more without the guide.
strokeGuide.hangul: {{index}}. {{char}}: top to bottom, left to right, keep the syllable block balanced.
strokeGuide.cjk: {{index}}. {{char}}: horizontal before vertical, top before bottom, outside before inside.
strokeGuide.default: {{index}}. {{char}}: copy the shape, then write it from memory.

writing.title: Writing practice
writing.subtitle: Trace, copy, listen, recall by meaning, study stroke order, and keep a notebook from your lessons.
writing.emptySource: No items in this source yet.
writing.recallTarget: Recall the target text from your notebook.

review.memory: I can write it from memory

institution.title: Institution dashboard
institution.subtitle: Manage seats, review learner activity, and keep your organization profile current.
institution.noAccessBody: This area is for institution owners, managers, and teachers. Request institution access or contact us if you expected to see it.

certificates.invalidBody: We could not find an active certificate with this ID.
certificates.readyBody: Issue your completion certificate for this class lesson.
certificates.issuedBody: Your completion certificate is ready to view or print.
certificates.paymentRequiredBody: Completion certificates are available with a certificate purchase or plan upgrade.
certificates.signInBody: Sign in to save and receive your completion certificate.
